summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SGMD new features: removed emergencial status, added resultado_conclusao field, calendar view modes, and Concluída breakdown functionality. Most features working correctly with one backend validation issue.

critical_bugs.issue: Backend accepts 'emergencial' status in POST requests despite frontend removal
critical_bugs.impact: Allows creation of changes with invalid status that shouldn't exist

passed_tests: Login with admin@sgmd.gov.br / admin123 works correctly
Dashboard loads with all metric cards (NO emergencial card exists - correct)
Status filter dropdown has NO emergencial option (correct)
Create change with status 'concluida' and resultado_conclusao field works
resultado_conclusao field appears when status = concluida
resultado_conclusao field accepts values: sucesso, sucesso_ressalvas, sem_sucesso, mudanca_cancelada
Concluída card shows breakdown when clicked with correct counts (sucesso: 2, ressalvas: 0, sem_sucesso: 0, cancelada: 0)
Concluída card breakdown collapses when clicked again
Calendar view mode tabs work (Semanal, Mensal, Semestral, Anual)
Calendar navigation works with different view modes (prev/next/today buttons)
Calendar displays changes correctly in different view modes
CSV export button works with success notification
Edit change functionality works (edit button activates edit mode)
Delete change functionality available in edit mode
Backend API accepts and saves resultado_conclusao field correctly
Backend API updates resultado_conclusao field correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Add backend validation to reject 'emergencial' status in ChangeCreate and ChangeUpdate models. Only allow: planejada, aprovada, em_execucao, concluida, cancelada
